content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the pending drain-loop remediations. PR-open gate failures and PR-watch CI failures now become VerificationFailure observations and flow through gj74 recovery classification instead of bypassing it. FileBead recovery now carries the original FailureObservation into follow-up bead creation, and the concrete follow-up description renders gate/CI failures, failing details, rerun counts, bot details, run ids, bead ids, and failure classes. Interrupted-run recovery now honors stop_first by calling the run-stop path, queues resume for the next drain cycle instead of resuming immediately in the same cycle, reclassifies any next-cycle resume failure through the same recovery path, and preserves P0 stop behavior before a queued resume can proceed.","outstanding_risks":["Existing modified .ralph-burning/projects/vl8z-1/ orchestration state remains outside review scope and was not modified intentionally.","No bead backlog files were edited, so br lint was not run."]

## Steps

1. [Completed] codex implementation turn

## Validation Evidence

None provided.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
